summary: Tested 3 new features: (1) Voice message recording UI + audio MIME upload, (2) Chat input 2-row layout redesign, (3) Admin 'Doporučujeme' (featured) marker color. Found and fixed 1 backend bug: GET /api/settings/marker-colors was not merging DB value with DEFAULT_MARKER_COLORS, causing 'featured' key to be missing when DB had older 9-key snapshot. 16/16 backend tests pass after fix. All 12 frontend feature checks pass.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: GET /api/settings/marker-colors in backend/routes/settings.py was returning stored DB value directly without merging with DEFAULT_MARKER_COLORS. Fix: `return {**DEFAULT_MARKER_COLORS, **setting['value']}` — same merge pattern frontend AppSettingsContext and useAdminData already do. This ensures newly added keys ('featured') are always returned even when DB has older snapshots.
All voice recording refs/handlers correctly set up in MessagesPage.js (mediaRecorderRef, audioChunksRef, recordingTimerRef)
stopRecording uploads to /api/messages/upload-media and sends with media_type='audio' which triggers audio player renderer
renderMediaMsg correctly handles media_type='audio' with data-testid='audio-player' and token-authenticated src URL
2-row form layout: Row 1 = action icons div (border-b separator), Row 2 = flex items-end gap-2 (textarea + send). Clean separation confirmed
seed_data_creation: Sent one audio message to M._S_(Marta) conversation for audio player UI test. Can be ignored.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Marker color system now has 10 fields: legal, news, community, support, specialists, nearby, messages, profile, featured, default. Backend GET /api/settings/marker-colors now merges defaults with DB so new keys are always present. Voice recording button (voice-record-btn) is in Row 1 of chat form, visible on both desktop and mobile. Audio player renders with data-testid='audio-player' for audio messages. MediaRecorder API available in browser. Admin /admin > Obsah tab > Barvy nadpisových markerů shows 10 fields including 'Doporučujeme'. Login: test1@bloom.cz / test123.
rca_of_issue: ROOT CAUSE: GET /api/settings/marker-colors returned stored DB value directly without merging with DEFAULT_MARKER_COLORS. When admin previously saved 9 color keys (before 'featured' was added), that old 9-key dict was stored in MongoDB. On GET, the endpoint returned the stored dict as-is, bypassing DEFAULT_MARKER_COLORS defaults. FIX: Changed `return setting['value']` to `return {**DEFAULT_MARKER_COLORS, **setting['value']}` so any new default keys are always present in the response. Reproduction: Reset DB or have an older marker_colors doc → GET returns 9 keys without 'featured'. After fix: GET always returns all 10 default keys merged with any stored overrides.

detailed_results.T13_frontend_2row_layout_structure: PASS - flex-col form, Row 2 has flex items-end gap-2
detailed_results.T15_frontend_mobile_textarea_width: PASS - 88% of row width on 390px viewport
